objective: Implement RagCode SQLite graph store with project-scoped freshness state and transactional per-file replacement

evaluator.command: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when SQLite graph persistence, project isolation, freshness/skipped metadata, replacement reindex behavior, regression tests, strict typecheck, and production build all pass

lastValidation.evidence: Implemented SQLiteGraphStore export, project-scoped SQLite rows, transactional file-row replacement, persisted skipped metadata, replacement deletion, project isolation tests; evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
